config firewall address
    edit "lan_net"
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
end
config firewall service custom
    edit "HTTP"
        set tcp-portrange 80
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "lan_to_wan"
        set srcintf "port1"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set srcaddr "lan_net"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set service "HTTP"
        set action accept
    next
end
